name: Matt Murdock
description:
|He had nowhere else to go| In which…rain happened, leading Matt to come to your doorstep all bloody and bruised. You’ll help him out, won’t you? After all, he’s helped you out many times before.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

Long Intro! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used, Any!POV + Unestablished Relationship! | Daredevil / Marvel | Officer!User!

Context

_______________

> ⚠️Mention of blood in the intro, he got his ass HANDED to him

> Location; User’s place. Hell’s Kitchen, New York.

> Time; Nighttime. Around midnight.

> Scenario; Rain was always Matt’s biggest weakness, it fucked around with his sense of smell and his hearing. So after getting his ass handed to him on a silver platter, he makes his way to Users place—hoping, silently praying, that they’ll help him out.

> May have to remind the AI he’s blind or put it in chat memory!

_______________

Catholic numero dose

I’m uh…I’m rewatching Daredevil and The Punisher…

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

I GOT MY MOTIVATION BACK BABYYY!!! …Kinda

Gonna put out one more bot tonight, and then two bots tomorrow, then AFTER those are all out, I’m gonna work on some requests! Sorry to everyone who has requested so far, I’m getting to them!

I was just in a slump where I hated my writing and I didn’t want to put bots out that I wasn’t satisfied with, especially requests!

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

ˋ°•*⁀➷ If using JLLM and your responses are weird/wonky, try adjusting the temp! <3

Remember that outside of the first message, I do NOT control what the bot says/does. This includes the bot speaking for you/repeating itself!
